title: Aurelia Digital Showroom
subtitle: Interactive digital gallery for high-end luxury real estate properties.
description: An immersive luxury digital showroom presenting architectural blueprints and high-fidelity rendering details. Designed to mimic a premium physical art gallery, this application features brushed gold transition borders, interactive details cards, and responsive container scaling.
deliverables: Sub-1.2s page interaction speeds through asset lazy-loading
Interactive structural model presentation using SVG layering
Fluid cross-viewport adaptability from 320px up to 4K resolutions

title: Lumina Analytics Suite
subtitle: Real-time performance and loading statistics dashboard.
description: A dashboard displaying critical web runtime performance metrics. Built with absolute focus on raw loading performance and clean, decoupled data-components, the suite renders real-time rendering statistics, asset load budgets, and server-side connection speeds with custom SVG timelines.
deliverables: Responsive 60 FPS charts drawn with custom React vector logic
Lightweight bundle footprint under 25KB total transfer size
Robust data fallbacks resolving network disconnect scenarios
